assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' section contains a table with two rows: 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' section lists all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' section states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and includes a concrete example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), with content 'No limitations known — no Serena instances reported issues.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-13: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances by examining `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern: serena_backend — tools: find_symbol, get_symbols_overview... serena_ui — tools: find_symbol, get_symbols_overview...'. Source identified as 'MCP tool listing in mcp-tools-with-serena.md'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 5-6: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. All sections were created new.' Lines 9-35 list each section as '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)', '## Bug Configuration (new)'. Lines 37-39 state 'All existing content in CLAUDE.md (title, Documentation section, Getting Started section) was preserved unchanged.'

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exactly matching the four required columns.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 37-39: '## Bug Configuration' section lists: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 44-46: 'Step 10 — Security Configuration: User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project. Security Configuration section was not created.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 40 with Bug Configuration). changes-log.md line 43 confirms: '## Security Configuration — user declined to enable security triage'.
